productDisplayName: Vans Unisex Palisades Vulc Beige Casual Shoes
description: Cute and preppy, this is a lightweight shoe from vans. Don't let the boys steal all the fun – Vans has great options for the girls too, especially this cute casual shoe in beige canvas. There's a secret cheeky twist inside – the neon yellow lining which perks up the sober beige. Very flattering shape and narrow laces make this a feminine choice from Vans. Upper Canvas uppers for durability and comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
